title: FundingAward
description: A discretionary funding award made by the Brooklyn Borough President — capital allocations, expense/discretionary contract awards, and tourism grants. One canonical schema reconciling 'Capital Awards' (n6ej-pebd), 'Discretionary Contract Awards' (tsb8-3rct) and 'Discretionary Contract Awards 2017-2018' (ubuy-v2nw), and 'Tourism Grants' (rma9-fm39, the richest, with a full geography spine). Also covers the /budget 'Get Funded by Borough President Reynoso' and capital-funding-application site sections.

projectTitle.description: Funded project / purpose ('CAPITAL PROJECT' / 'Project Title' / 'Actg-Line Description' / 'Discretionary Grant Allocations').

acceptanceDate.description: Contract acceptance date where present ('Hdr-System Acceptance Date').
